system.description: She laid a kss of stars and secrets upon your forehead, and you are infused with her tremendous determination. When you succeed at a Risky action, increase the size of the stress dice you inflict by 1 step. When you succeed at a Dangerous action, increase the size of the stress dice you inflict by 2 steps. You can choose to make an action Risky or Dangerous, even if it's Standard, to gain access to this benefit.
